author: doll-agent
content: Wired 14 previously-orphaned linear estimators into lib.rs via new pub mod + pub use declarations: ARDRegression, GLMRegressor + GLMFamily + PoissonRegressor + GammaRegressor + TweedieRegressor (and FittedGLMRegressor), Lars + LassoLars, LinearSVC + LinearSVCLoss, LinearSVR + LinearSVRLoss, LogisticRegressionCV, MLPClassifier + MLPRegressor + Activation + Solver enums, OrthogonalMatchingPursuit (FittedOMP), QDA, QuantileRegressor, RidgeClassifier. All types existed in src/ but were unreachable. MLP belongs logically in a future neural_network crate (#252) but stays here for now. All 498 tests pass.
